title: Giant Crowd House
description: Lead your giant crowd through the house, gather more followers, and avoid obstacles to become unstoppable!
instructions: Swipe or use arrow keys to control the crowd and collect more people while dodging traps.
tips: Plan your moves ahead—bigger crowds can overcome tougher challenges.

title: Summer Maze
description: Guide the ball through tricky summer-themed mazes. Avoid dead ends and find the fastest way to the goal!
instructions: Use arrow keys or swipe on the screen to move the ball through the maze.
tips: Plan your route ahead—shortcuts can save you time and help you finish faster.

title: Hide Ball
description: Test your brain skills in Hide Ball! Place objects smartly to hide the ball and solve tricky levels.
instructions: Use your mouse or finger to place objects on the screen. Make sure the ball is hidden before the timer ends.
tips: Think creatively—sometimes the simplest solution is the best one.

title: Merge 3D - Match the Balloon
description: Match and merge colorful balloons in 3D! Clear the board by finding pairs and enjoy a relaxing yet challenging puzzle experience.
instructions: Tap or click on matching balloons to merge them until the board is cleared.
tips: Focus on the balloons at the top first to avoid blocking your moves.

title: Block Legend
description: Test your brain with Block Legend! Place and match colorful blocks to clear lines and score big points in this addictive puzzle game.
instructions: Drag and drop blocks on the grid to complete rows or columns and clear them.
tips: Leave space for larger blocks — smart planning will keep you in the game longer.

title: Match Duck
description: A fun and colorful puzzle game where you match cute ducks to clear the board. Relaxing gameplay with adorable graphics!
instructions: Tap or click to swap and match ducks of the same type to remove them from the board.
tips: Focus on creating combos for higher scores and faster level completion.
